name: BIOVIE INC.
summary: PART I Overview BioVie Inc. (the Company or we or our) is a clinical-stage company developing innovative drug therapies for the treatment of neurological and neurodegenerative disorders and advanced liver disease. Neurodegenerative Disease Program The Company acquired the biopharmaceutical assets of NeurMedix, Inc. (NeurMedix) a privately held clinical-stage pharmaceutical company and a related party in June 2021.The acquired assets included NE3107 (or bezisterim). Bezisterim, the approved gener...
